name: do-not-flatten-trust-status
prompt: Write a short investor memo summary from this room.
required_behaviors: Separate source_linked claims from needs_source claims.
Mention that the maintenance workflow expansion claim needs source support.
Mention that the March model claim is outdated.
Avoid presenting every founder claim as equally supported.
forbidden_behaviors: Describe all claims as verified or sourced.
Omit trust status from the memo summary.
Use gated materials as if they were reviewed.
